patch.value:
Data-loss / wrong field mapping. (a) export ran `list-all --json` WITHOUT --include-body, so the body column was ALWAYS empty. (b) export columns and import flags used due_date and milestone, which do not exist in pm — `pm create` has --deadline and no milestone. So every imported row carrying due_date/milestone FAILED with "Unknown option --milestone", and export never populated those columns.

Repro (before fix):
  export of an item with body -> body column empty.
  pm csv import md.csv (md.csv has due_date,milestone) -> "Row 2: create failed — Unknown option --milestone", imported 0 skipped 1, exit 0.
Expected: body round-trips; deadline round-trips.

Fix: export now passes --include-body; replaced due_date/milestone columns with a single `deadline` column (still accepts a legacy due_date header on import) mapped to `--deadline`; removed the invalid --milestone create flag. Verified: body + deadline both survive a full export->import round-trip.
csv export drops body (no --include-body) and uses nonexistent due_date/milestone create flags

author: codex

patch.value: Added --include-body to export; switched to deadline column mapped to --deadline; dropped invalid --milestone flag. Round-trip verified.

message: Added --include-body to export; switched to deadline column mapped to --deadline; dropped invalid --milestone flag. Round-trip verified.
